project_type: AWS CDK Go app - event-driven sleep audio pipeline
build_system: Go modules + AWS CDK CLI (via npx). cdk.json app command is 'go mod download && go run cdk-base.go'
test_framework: Go testing with github.com/aws/aws-cdk-go/awscdk/v2/assertions for CDK template assertions
build_command: NODE_OPTIONS='' GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct GONOSUMCHECK='*' npx cdk synth
verification_instructions: 1. Run go test -v ./... (with NODE_OPTIONS='' GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct GONOSUMCHECK='*'). 2. Run cdk synth (same env vars). Both must pass.
snapshot_or_generated_files: cdk.out/ directory generated by cdk synth but not checked in (.gitignore excludes it)
setup_instructions: Go 1.25 and Node.js 22 are pre-installed. Run 'go mod download' with GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct to fetch dependencies.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - allowlisted domains for package registries. Must use GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct (not direct alone) because go.googlesource.com is blocked. Must set NODE_OPTIONS='' because jsii runtime spawns Node.js child process that fails with proxy-bootstrap.js preload. No Docker daemon available for docker build.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal code. Conventional commits. ARCHITECTURE.md must stay in sync with all infrastructure changes. Run go test and cdk synth before every commit.
key_patterns: Single stack 'CdkBaseStack' defined in cdk-base.go via NewCdkBaseStack(). Tests in cdk-base_test.go use assertions.Template_FromStack(). Uses L2 constructs. CDK context flags already configured in cdk.json. Stack uses jsii.String() and jsii.Number() wrappers for Go CDK.
directory_structure: Flat single-package layout (package main). All Go source in root. .github/workflows/ci.yml for CI. ARCHITECTURE.md for design docs.
